steps.title: Find the angle measure
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle and angle $C=30^\circ$, so angle $A$ is
$$180^\circ-90^\circ-30^\circ=60^\circ$$

steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content: In a $30^\circ$-$60^\circ$-$90^\circ$ triangle with hypotenuse $114$, the shorter leg is $57$ and the longer leg is $57\sqrt{3}$. For angle $A$, tangent is opposite over adjacent.

steps.title: Compute the ratio
steps.content:
Use the side opposite angle $A$ over the side adjacent to angle $A$.
$$\tan A=\frac{57\sqrt{3}}{57}=\sqrt{3}=1.732$$
The answer is 1.732.
